body:
## Problem

The /lists/<slug> SSR handler (api/meta/[...path].js:802-816) returns title + description (from TOP_10_LISTS data) but NO articleSchema and NO breadcrumbSchema.

#1075 added BreadcrumbList to the App.js client-side renderer — invisible to crawlers. The /lists index handler (line 818+) needs checking too.

Top list pages ('fastest metal drummers', 'best death metal drummers') have high-intent query potential and NO JSON-LD in SSR response.

## Fix

File: api/meta/[...path].js, listMatch return block (line 806-816)

Add:
  articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
    '@context': 'https://schema.org',
    '@type': 'ItemList',
    name: list.title,
    description: list.seoDescription || list.description,
    url: BASE_URL + '/lists/' + listSlug,
    numberOfItems: list.items?.length || 10,
    publisher: { '@type': 'Organization', name: 'MetalForge', url: BASE_URL },
  }),
  breadcrumbSchema: [
    { name: 'Home', url: BASE_URL },
    { name: 'Ranked Lists', url: BASE_URL + '/lists' },
    { name: list.title, url: BASE_URL + '/lists/' + listSlug },
  ]

Data available: TOP_10_LISTS[listSlug] (already imported) has title, seoDescription, items.

## Expected page count
~8 list pages (all entries in TOP_10_LISTS data)

## Estimated organic uplift
- ItemList rich result eligibility for ranked queries ('top 10 fastest metal drummers')
- BreadcrumbList rich result on SERP
- High-intent informational queries with moderate volume

## Quality gate
- All 8 list pages return valid ItemList + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD from SSR
- BreadcrumbList: Home > Ranked Lists > [List Title]
- Google Rich Results Test passes on 2 sample lists

## Verify
1. curl https://metalforge.io/api/meta?path=/lists/fastest-metal-drummers returns articleSchema with @type:ItemList
2. breadcrumbSchema with 3 items present
3. Google Rich Results Test shows ItemList valid
4. title/description still present (no regression on #1210)
5. /lists index page unaffected

## Done
When all ~8 /lists/<slug> SSR responses include ItemList + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD.
title: SEO batch: /lists/<slug> pages — BreadcrumbList + ItemList JSON-LD missing from SSR (~8 pages)
note: Fix was already merged into main via PR #1537 (commit d0a0c74). All 8 list pages now return ItemList + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD from SSR. Syntax validated. No code changes needed on this run.
